productDisplayName: Puma Men Cell Turin Perf Black Sports Shoes
description: Go that extra mile with ease with the Cell Turin from puma. This running shoe features a sleek, contoured upper, a cushioning midsole and a non-skid rubber sole that offers all that comfort that makes you never want to leave the track. Upper Synthetic leather upper with all over perforated details for breathability Padded collar and tongue for snug comfort Patent-leather formstripe logo Cushioned collar and tongue for plush comfort Midsole EVA midsole for durability CM-EVA midsole with 10cell technology in the heel and midfoot TPU shank for comfort OrthoLite sockliner for superior comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial function Outsole Durable rubber outsole for excellent grip and traction
